title: polygala nicaeensis subsp. nicaeensis
intro: Polygala nicaeensis subsp. nicaeensis is a plant species in the Polygalaceae family, commonly known as the French lavender or Nicae polygala, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. The health benefits of Polygala nicaeensis subsp. nicaeensis include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Polygala nicaeensis subsp. nicaeensis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
